description_long: This rifle features a sleek, predominantly black exterior with a cylindrical barrel and a prominent drum magazine beneath the receiver. The stock is angled and ergonomically shaped, likely made from a durable polymer or composite material, and the grip is integrated into the stock for comfortable handling. The rifle has a forward vertical grip for improved stability during firing, and the upper receiver appears to be constructed from metal, possibly steel or aluminum alloy. The barrel is long and straight, with a simple muzzle and no visible attachments. The magazine is a large drum type, suggesting a high ammunition capacity. There are no visible advanced sighting systems, only basic iron sights integrated into the top of the receiver.
description: A modern black rifle with a drum magazine, ergonomic stock, and forward vertical grip, featuring a long barrel and basic iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular drum magazine and the cylindrical barrel aligned directly toward the viewer.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, the drum magazine, the angled stock, and the forward vertical grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the drum magazine, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the stock, barrel, and magazine visible from the other side.
